remove_skill.description: Allows the model to remove skills.
rules: Use APPEND_SKILL and REMOVE_SKILL only for single skill append or remove.
For multiple appending you can also use following markers:<APPEND_SKILLS: name1, name2, name3 >
You may append multiple skills at once.
Never append a skill that is already listed in <CURRENT_APPENDED_SKILLS>! Continue or notify user!
